title: How can I add a person to boards in bulk?
excerpt: I want to add a person to a number of different boards, all in the one workspace. How can I do this in bulk? At the moment I am going into every individual board and adding them that way. This is VERY time consuming.

posts.author: janelegall (Jane)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to add a person to a number of different boards, all in the one workspace. How can I do this in bulk? At the moment I am going into every individual board and adding them that way. This is VERY time consuming.

posts.author: FrancisElliott (Francis Elliott)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Jane,

One way of improving this could be using Teams. If you assign permissions based on Teams, then granting access may be as simple as adding someone to the right team. That case you wouldn’t have the tiring job of adding people to boards over and over again.

That said, if this is tiring, alarm bells are ringing for me that you might have too many boards! That’s something to consider as well.

Here’s some of the documentation on Teams. Hopefully it helps you to manage access more efficiently.

Support

All about teams

5 min read Feature   At monday.com, we're all about transparency and communication. We believe that one of the most important things in your workplace is the communication between your teammates! ...

posts.author: NoyNoy (Noy Malka)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Jane!
We’ve developed an app called VisionControl that solves this exact issue!
With VisionControl, you can add multiple users to multiple boards in one click, manage permissions easily, and save valuable time.

Check it out here: VisionControl - Marketplace – happy to help with any questions!
